title: Escape from Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We made it to the Battle- ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll never go back to that hell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Marines! Send a ship this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll chase them and finish them off...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: This is bad!!! They're already back up!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: How many ships do they have!!!?
